name: Inspiring Generation
overview: Based in the 1930's of Shanghai, China, this drama is a story about love, friendship, patriotism and desire. Shin Jung Tae (Kim Hyun Joong) is an outrageous and clumsy man, but has an unconditional love for his country and family. He was known as the best fighter in the alleys of Shanghai.

trailers.title: Inspiring Generation | 감격시대 | 感激时代 [Trailer]
